content: Most people write about their daily life.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Zifre (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:La maggior parte delle persone scrive sulla propria vita quotidiana
arq:قريب ڨع نّاس يكّتبو علا حياتهوم لّي اعيشوها
slv:Večina ljudi piše o svojem vsakodnevnem življenju
tha:คนส่วนใหญ่เขียนเกี่ยวกับชีวิตประจำวันของพวกเขา
